if_minus_plus_reloaded.explanation: Annotate the if-minus-plus program with a complete decorated proof showing all intermediate assertions.

if_minus_plus_correct.solution:
Theorem if_minus_plus_correct :
  forall m n, outer_triple_valid (if_minus_plus_dec).
Proof.
  verify.
Qed.
if_minus_plus_correct.explanation: Verify the decorated if_minus_plus program using the automated verify tactic.

div_mod_outer_triple_valid.solution:
Theorem div_mod_outer_triple_valid : forall a b,
  outer_triple_valid (div_mod_dec a b).
Proof.
  verify.
Qed.

slow_assignment.explanation: Slow assignment transfers value from X to Y one step at a time. Loop invariant: X + Y = m.

parity.explanation: Compute parity by repeatedly subtracting 2. Invariant: parity X = parity m.

sqrt.explanation: Integer square root by incrementing Z until (Z+1)^2 > X. Invariant: Z^2 <= m.

factorial_correct.explanation: Iterative factorial. Loop invariant: Y * fact(X) = fact(m).

minimum_correct.solution:
Theorem minimum_correct : forall a b,
  outer_triple_valid (minimum_dec a b).
Proof.
  verify. all: omega.
Qed.
minimum_correct.explanation: Verify the minimum-finding program using the automated verify tactic.

two_loops.solution:
Theorem two_loops : forall a b c,
  outer_triple_valid (two_loops_dec a b c).
Proof.
  verify. all: omega.
Qed.
two_loops.explanation: Verify the two-loops program that computes a+b+c by incrementing.

dpow2.solution:
Theorem dpow2_down_correct : forall n,
  outer_triple_valid (dpow2_dec n).
Proof.
  verify.
  - (* loop body *) rewrite pow2_plus_1. omega.
  - (* postcondition *) subst. replace (1 - 1) with 0 by omega.
    simpl. omega.
Qed.

fib_eqn.solution:
Lemma fib_eqn : forall n,
  n > 0 ->
  fib n + fib (Init.Nat.pred n) = fib (n + 1).
Proof.
  intros n Hn. destruct n.
  - omega.
  - simpl. omega.
Qed.
fib_eqn.explanation: Fibonacci recurrence: fib(n) + fib(n-1) = fib(n+1) for n > 0.

fib.solution:
Theorem dfib_correct : forall n,
  outer_triple_valid (dfib n).
Proof.
  verify.
  - (* loop body invariant preservation *)
    rewrite fib_eqn by omega. omega.
  - (* postcondition *) subst. omega.
Qed.

wp.solution:
(* Examples of weakest preconditions:
   1) wp (X := 5) (X = 5) = True
   2) wp (X := Y + 1) (X <= 5) = (Y + 1 <= 5)
   3) wp (X := Y + 1) (0 <= X /\ X <= 5) = (0 <= Y + 1 /\ Y + 1 <= 5)
*)
wp.explanation: The weakest precondition for an assignment X := a with postcondition Q is Q[X/a].

is_wp.solution:
Theorem is_wp_example :
  is_wp (fun st => st Y <= 4) <{X := Y + 1}> (fun st => st X <= 5).
Proof.
  unfold is_wp. split.
  - eapply hoare_consequence_pre.
    + apply hoare_asgn.
    + unfold assert_implies, assertion_sub. intros st H. simpl. omega.
  - intros P HP st Hst.
    unfold valid_hoare_triple in HP.
    specialize (HP st (X !-> aeval st <{Y + 1}> ; st)).
    assert (Heval: st =[ X := Y + 1 ]=> (X !-> aeval st <{Y + 1}> ; st)).
    { apply E_Asgn. reflexivity. }
    specialize (HP Heval Hst). simpl in HP.
    rewrite t_update_eq in HP. simpl in HP. omega.
Qed.
is_wp.explanation: Show that Y <= 4 is the weakest precondition of X := Y + 1 with respect to X <= 5.

hoare_asgn_weakest.solution:
Theorem hoare_asgn_weakest : forall Q X a,
  is_wp (Q [X |-> a]) <{X := a}> Q.
Proof.
  unfold is_wp. split.
  - apply hoare_asgn.
  - intros P HP st Hst.
    unfold valid_hoare_triple in HP.
    specialize (HP st (X !-> aeval st a ; st) (E_Asgn _ _ _ _ eq_refl) Hst).
    unfold assertion_sub. assumption.
Qed.
hoare_asgn_weakest.explanation: The substitution Q[X/a] is the weakest precondition of X := a with respect to Q.

hoare_havoc_weakest.solution:
Lemma hoare_havoc_weakest : forall (P Q : Assertion) (X : string),
  {{ P }} havoc X {{ Q }} ->
  P ->> havoc_pre X Q.
Proof.
  unfold valid_hoare_triple, havoc_pre, assert_implies.
  intros P Q X HT st HP n.
  apply (HT st (X !-> n ; st)).
  - apply E_Havoc.
  - assumption.
Qed.
hoare_havoc_weakest.explanation: havoc_pre is the weakest precondition for havoc: any valid precondition implies havoc_pre.
